modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with Nursing Sim Lab equipment and camera functionality

full_description_text:  
The user reported problems with the Nursing Sim Lab equipment. They are unable to see images from the camera. Additionally, the mannequin and sim recorder are not functioning properly. Immediate assistance is required to resolve these issues.
short_description: Issues with Nursing Sim Lab equipment and camera functionality
description: The user reported problems with the Nursing Sim Lab equipment. They are unable to see images from the camera. Additionally, the mannequin and sim recorder are not functioning properly. Immediate assistance is required to resolve these issues.
